title: UPSC CSE 2025 Result Out: Check Complete List Of Qualified Candidates Here
description: UPSC CSE Final Result Top Ranks 2025: Of the 958 successful candidates, 317 belong to the General category, 104 to the Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), 306 to the Other Backward Classes (OBC), and 73 to the Scheduled Tribes (ST) category.
